name: Pasig River Regatta
description: Season opener on the Pasig. Mixed 500m and 200m sprints, plus the open standard category.
thumbnailCredit: Photo by Joseph Corl on Unsplash

name: Putrajaya International Dragon Boat Festival
description: Our annual cross-border trip. Three days of racing against teams from Malaysia, Singapore, Indonesia, and Hong Kong.

name: Subic Bay Dragon Boat Cup
description: Long-distance 2000m plus mixed sprint heats. Coastal conditions favor strong steerers.
thumbnailCredit: Photo by Mick Haupt on Unsplash

name: Boracay International Dragon Boat Festival
description: Open water races in front of White Beach. Won bronze in the Mixed 500m final on a tight photo finish.
thumbnailCredit: Photo by Laurentiu Morariu on Unsplash

result.notes: Bronze medal — first podium on international waters.

name: Manila Bay Heritage Cup
description: Local season closer. Strong tailwinds in the afternoon final boosted everyone's times.
thumbnailCredit: Photo by Paolo Syiaco on Unsplash

result.notes: Silver — beaten by 0.4s in a textbook chase.

name: Iloilo River Regatta
description: First time racing the Iloilo course. Tight bends rewarded steerer discipline and clean exchanges.
thumbnailCredit: Photo by Joseph Corl on Unsplash

result.notes: Top five finish in our first appearance at this regatta.

name: Putrajaya International Dragon Boat Festival
description: Long weekend in Malaysia. Squad split across mixed and open categories — solid heats, eliminated in semis.
thumbnailCredit: Photo by Junliang Deng on Unsplash

result.notes: Semi-final exit. Best Standard-boat result to date.

name: Pre-season Training Camp
description: Three-day pre-season camp focused on stroke timing, exchanges, and starts. No racing.
thumbnailCredit: Photo by Joseph Corl on Unsplash
